description: You are an urban transit planner for the City of Bologna's public transportation authority (TPER). The Pasubio corridor has received complaints about insufficient bus service coverage in the northern section of the network. Redesign the bus service in the Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) to improve coverage and frequency. Implement a new express bus line named 'Line_Express_N' connecting the northern and southern parts of the network. This line must include at least 4 new bus stops on edges that currently lack them, and at least 3 bus vehicles with a headway of approximately 600 seconds, each serving all new stops and at least 2 existing stops. Generate at least 50 person trips using public transit (mode='public'). Run the simulation and export a service coverage analysis to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/transit_service_report.csv with columns: stop_id, stop_name_or_lane, is_new, line_served, boarding_count, and alighting_count. Provide a service improvement summary explaining the changes and expected ridership impact to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/transit_redesign_summary.txt.
